settings.heading: Happy Pet Parents
settings.review_1_text: My dog absolutely loves the new harness! It fits perfectly and the material is top-notch. Highly recommended for pet owners in India.
settings.review_2_text: The delivery was super fast and the quality exceeded my expectations. Pawflok is my new go-to for pet accessories.
